case_title: NEW VENTURES LLC VS. DEAN ARBIT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF (DEFENDANT'S CLAIM) MAY-17-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PARTIES TO JUN-07-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JAMES MCALPINE, PRESIDENT OF NEW WEST VENTURES LLC. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JIM MCALPHINE--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW WEST VENTURES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARBIT, DEAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ARBIT, DEAN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT NEW WEST VENTURES LLC $5,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,925.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF MAY, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 1, 2016 TURN OVER TO DEFENDANT ONE HALF OF THE STOCK PLAINTIFF RECEIVES FROM SERNA (1/2 VALUE IS APPROXIMATELY $2,500) MY DX (ONE HALF VALUE IS APPROXIMATELY $850) AND STEEP HILL (ONE HALF VALUE IS APPROXIMATELY $2,500 "VALUE" IS AS OF JUNE 7, 2016. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
